metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2456
metadata.comment:
Rationale: LRRC4 interacts with netrin-G CAMs through its ectodomain in an isoform-specific manner.
LRRC4 localizes to the postsynaptic side of excitatory synapses.
LRRC4 expression in heterologous cells induces functional presynaptic differentiation in contacting neurites.
Direct aggregation of LRRC4 on the dendritic surface induces clustering of excitatory postsynaptic proteins.. Experimental description: Methods
Immunoelectron microscopy.
For quantitative electron microscopy, we used two immunoreacted sections from each of two rats labeled with secondary antibody to rabbit Fab fragments coupled to 10 nm gold particles (British BioCell).

Coculture assay.
Coculture assays were performed essentially as described (17,18).
(ref. 17) Cell Culture.
Hippocampal neuron cultures were prepared from E18 rat embryos.

DNA constructs.
Full-length mouse NGL-2 (DQ177325, aa 1-652; from a brain cDNA library; Clontech) and NGL-2 ΔC (1-649) were subcloned into pEGFP-N1.
